aesthetic_direction: The design system aims for a warm and inviting yet minimal aesthetic. It utilizes a nature-inspired color palette with warm, earthy tones to create a welcoming and calming experience. Typography is carefully chosen to balance readability with a touch of sophistication. The layout emphasizes clarity and ease of use, with a card-based organization and progressive disclosure to avoid overwhelming users. Subtle animations and micro-interactions provide feedback and guidance, enhancing the overall user experience. The design prioritizes accessibility and adheres to WCAG guidelines.

page_inventory.name: Homepage / Landing
page_inventory.purpose: Primary conversion page — capture signups and demonstrate value
page_inventory.layout: Hero with property image and value proposition → Feature highlights → Social proof (testimonials/logos) → Pricing overview → Call to action
page_inventory.content_requirements: Compelling headline, concise value proposition, high-quality property images, customer testimonials, clear pricing information, prominent CTA.

page_inventory.name: Property Listings
page_inventory.purpose: Display available properties with search and filtering options
page_inventory.layout: Map view with property markers → List of property cards with brief details → Filter sidebar
page_inventory.content_requirements: Property images, descriptions, location data, pricing, amenities, filter options.

page_inventory.name: Tenant Screening
page_inventory.purpose: Provide tools and resources for screening potential tenants
page_inventory.layout: Multi-step form for tenant application → Background check integration → Scoring system with risk assessment
page_inventory.content_requirements: Application form fields, background check API integration, scoring criteria, risk assessment details.

page_inventory.name: Lease Management
page_inventory.purpose: Manage and track lease agreements
page_inventory.layout: Dashboard with lease summaries → Expiration date tracking → Renewal options and automated reminders
page_inventory.content_requirements: Lease agreement details, expiration dates, renewal terms, automated reminder settings.

page_inventory.name: Online Rent Collection
page_inventory.purpose: Enable tenants to pay rent online and track payments
page_inventory.layout: Secure payment gateway integration → Payment history and statements → Automated rent reminders
page_inventory.content_requirements: Payment gateway API integration, payment history data, statement generation, reminder settings.

page_inventory.name: Accounting & Financial Reporting
page_inventory.purpose: Provide financial reports and accounting tools
page_inventory.layout: Dashboard with financial summaries → Income statements and expense reports → Customizable reporting options
page_inventory.content_requirements: Financial data, reporting templates, customizable report settings.

page_inventory.name: Maintenance Request Management
page_inventory.purpose: Manage and track maintenance requests from tenants
page_inventory.layout: List of maintenance requests with status updates → Vendor assignment and communication tools → Predictive maintenance insights
page_inventory.content_requirements: Maintenance request details, status updates, vendor information, communication logs, predictive maintenance insights.

page_inventory.name: Tenant Communication Tools
page_inventory.purpose: Facilitate communication between landlords and tenants
page_inventory.layout: Messaging system with real-time updates → Announcement board for important notices → Notification settings
page_inventory.content_requirements: Messaging API integration, announcement content, notification preferences.

page_inventory.name: Document Management
page_inventory.purpose: Store and manage important documents related to properties and tenants
page_inventory.layout: File storage system with folder organization → Search functionality and version control → Access control and security settings
page_inventory.content_requirements: File storage API integration, folder structure, search index, version control, access control settings.

page_inventory.name: Reporting & Analytics
page_inventory.purpose: Provide insights into property performance and market trends
page_inventory.layout: Dashboard with key performance indicators (KPIs) → Charts and graphs for data visualization → Customizable report generation
page_inventory.content_requirements: Property performance data, market data, reporting templates, customizable report settings.

page_inventory.name: Mobile Accessibility
page_inventory.purpose: Promote the mobile app and its features
page_inventory.layout: Landing page showcasing the mobile app's benefits → Download links for iOS and Android → Screenshots and feature highlights
page_inventory.content_requirements: Mobile app screenshots, feature descriptions, download links.

page_inventory.name: AI-Powered Automation for Predictive Maintenance
page_inventory.purpose: Showcase the AI-powered predictive maintenance features
page_inventory.layout: Explanation of AI algorithms and their benefits → Examples of predictive maintenance in action → ROI data and case studies
page_inventory.content_requirements: Explanation of AI algorithms, examples of predictive maintenance, ROI data.

page_inventory.name: Integrated Smart Scheduling and Booking System
page_inventory.purpose: Demonstrate the smart scheduling and booking system
page_inventory.layout: Interactive demo of the scheduling system → Booking calendar and appointment management features → Integration with other modules
page_inventory.content_requirements: Scheduling system demo, booking calendar, appointment management features.

page_inventory.name: Extensive Setup Guides and Dedicated Backend Support
page_inventory.purpose: Provide setup guides and support resources
page_inventory.layout: Knowledge base with articles and videos → Troubleshooting guides and FAQs → Dedicated backend support contact information
page_inventory.content_requirements: Setup guides, troubleshooting articles, video tutorials.

page_inventory.name: Focus on User-Friendly Design with Vite
page_inventory.purpose: Highlight the user-friendly design and technology used
page_inventory.layout: Showcase of design principles and technology stack → User interface examples and testimonials → Benefits of using Vite
page_inventory.content_requirements: Design principles, technology stack information, user interface examples.

page_inventory.name: Advanced Google Maps Integration for Property Visualization
page_inventory.purpose: Showcase the Google Maps integration
page_inventory.layout: Interactive map with property locations and details → Property overlays and search filters → Integration with other modules
page_inventory.content_requirements: Google Maps API integration, property location data, property details.

page_inventory.name: Pricing
page_inventory.purpose: Display pricing plans and features
page_inventory.layout: Pricing table with feature comparison → Plan details and benefits → Call-to-action buttons for signup
page_inventory.content_requirements: Pricing plans, feature lists, call-to-action buttons.

page_inventory.name: Product Demo
page_inventory.purpose: Allow users to book a product demo
page_inventory.layout: Booking form with calendar integration → Available demo times and dates → Contact information and confirmation
page_inventory.content_requirements: Booking form fields, calendar integration API.

page_inventory.name: Interactive Onboarding Wizard
page_inventory.purpose: Guide new users through the platform
page_inventory.layout: Multi-step wizard with progress tracking → Helpful tips and guidance at each step → Completion confirmation and next steps
page_inventory.content_requirements: Onboarding steps, progress indicators, helpful tips.

user_flows.name: New User Signup → First Property Added
steps: Landing page hero CTA → Signup modal → Role selection (Landlord/Tenant) → Guided onboarding flow → Add first property (address lookup) → Dashboard with property overview
user_flows.target_time: under 5 minutes to first property added

user_flows.name: Tenant Application → Lease Signing
steps: Property listing page → Apply now CTA → Tenant application form → Background check processing → Landlord review and approval → Lease agreement generation → Electronic signature workflow

user_flows.name: Maintenance Request → Vendor Assignment
steps: Tenant submits maintenance request → Landlord reviews request → Vendor assignment and scheduling → Maintenance completion and feedback

user_flows.name: Rent Payment → Automated Reminders
steps: Tenant receives rent reminder → Online rent payment via payment gateway → Payment confirmation and receipt → Automated late payment reminders

feature_specs.description: Display available properties with search and filtering options.

feature_specs.ui_approach: Messaging system with real-time updates. Announcement board for important notices. Notification settings.

feature_specs.description: Store and manage important documents related to properties and tenants.
feature_specs.ui_approach: File storage system with folder organization. Search functionality and version control. Access control and security settings.

feature_specs.description: Provide insights into property performance and market trends.

feature_specs.description: Promote the mobile app and its features.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Landing page showcasing the mobile app's benefits. Download links for iOS and Android. Screenshots and feature highlights.

feature_specs.description: Showcase the AI-powered predictive maintenance features.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Explanation of AI algorithms and their benefits. Examples of predictive maintenance in action. ROI data and case studies.

feature_specs.name: Integrated Smart Scheduling and Booking System
feature_specs.description: Demonstrate the smart scheduling and booking system.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Interactive demo of the scheduling system. Booking calendar and appointment management features. Integration with other modules.

feature_specs.name: Extensive Setup Guides and Dedicated Backend Support
feature_specs.description: Provide setup guides and support resources.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Knowledge base with articles and videos. Troubleshooting guides and FAQs. Dedicated backend support contact information.

feature_specs.name: Focus on User-Friendly Design with Vite
feature_specs.description: Highlight the user-friendly design and technology used.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Showcase of design principles and technology stack. User interface examples and testimonials. Benefits of using Vite.

feature_specs.name: Advanced Google Maps Integration for Property Visualization
feature_specs.description: Showcase the Google Maps integration.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Interactive map with property locations and details. Property overlays and search filters. Integration with other modules.

feature_specs.name: Generative AI Content
feature_specs.description: Generative AI for dynamic property content creation including listings, descriptions, and marketing materials.
feature_specs.ui_approach: AI-powered content generation panel with preview. One-click property description generation. Marketing copy suggestions with tone customization.

feature_specs.name: Voice-Enabled AI Assistant
feature_specs.description: Voice-enabled AI assistants for agents to interact with the platform hands-free.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Floating voice assistant button with waveform visualization. Voice command recognition feedback. Transcription display with action confirmation.

feature_specs.name: Predictive Investment Insights
feature_specs.description: AI-powered predictive insights for property investment analysis and market forecasting.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Interactive charts with trend lines and predictions. Market heat maps. Investment scoring with confidence intervals.

feature_specs.name: AI-Powered Chatbot
feature_specs.description: Intelligent chatbot for tenant and visitor support.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Floating chat widget with conversation history. Quick action buttons. Seamless handoff to human support.

feature_specs.name: Virtual Tours
feature_specs.description: 360-degree virtual property tours for remote viewing.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Immersive 360-degree viewer with hotspots. Room-by-room navigation. Integration with property details panel.

feature_specs.name: Property Valuation
feature_specs.description: AI-powered property valuation estimates based on market data and comparable sales.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Valuation dashboard with comparable property analysis. Interactive adjustment sliders. Confidence score display.

feature_specs.name: Lead Generation & CRM
feature_specs.description: Lead capture forms and customer relationship management tools for agents.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Lead capture widgets on property pages. CRM pipeline board with drag-and-drop. Contact management with interaction history.

feature_specs.name: Automated Marketing
feature_specs.description: Automated email and social media marketing for property listings.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Campaign builder with templates. Audience segmentation tools. Performance analytics dashboard.

shadows.style: layered soft shadows using text_primary color for natural warmth

micro_interactions: form field focus highlight with accent color border
card elevation on hover with shadow transition

layout.hero_style: Text-focused hero sections with large, expressive typography (6xl-8xl). No stock photos — use subtle geometric patterns or gradient backgrounds from the warm neutrals palette.
layout.card_style: Rounded corners (radius_lg), soft shadows (shadow_md), hover elevation (shadow_card_hover), clear content hierarchy with consistent padding (spacing 6).
layout.navigation_style: Clean top navigation bar with logo left, links center, CTA right. Sticky on scroll with subtle backdrop blur. Mobile hamburger menu with slide-in drawer.
layout.sidebar_style: Collapsible left sidebar for authenticated dashboard views. 240px expanded, 64px collapsed with icon-only mode.
layout.footer_style: Multi-column footer with company info, product links, resources, and legal. Newsletter signup form.

cta_patterns: Start Free Trial - No Credit Card Required

steps.title: Import or Add First Tenant
steps.description: Quick tenant setup with import options

steps.title: See AI Dashboard Insights
steps.description: Watch your dashboard populate with data

onboarding_flow.target_aha_moment: First property fully set up within 5 minutes

taglines: Your AI Property Manager — From Rent to Reports

mobile_design.navigation: Tab bar with 4 main sections: Home, Listings, Inbox, Profile
native_features: Push notifications for rent reminders and maintenance updates
GPS integration for property location and nearby amenities
Camera integration for property photos and maintenance documentation
Offline access for property details and tenant contacts
Mobile CRM integration for lead management on the go
mobile_design.app_icon_description: A stylized house shape with a subtle AI brain symbol integrated into the roofline. Colors use a gradient of primary (#8B7355) to accent (#6B8F71) from the Warm Neutrals palette. Minimalist and modern style.
mobile_design.splash_screen_description: RealEstate AI logo centered on a background of the primary color (#8B7355). Subtle fade-in animation creating anticipation.
mobile_design.color_adjustments: Increase contrast for outdoor visibility. Use darker shades of the primary color for text on white backgrounds.
gesture_patterns: Swipe to navigate between property listings
Long press on a property card for more options
Pinch to zoom on property maps and images

mobile_asset_prompts.prompt: A minimalist app icon for RealEstate AI. Stylized house silhouette with clean geometric lines, featuring a subtle AI neural network pattern integrated into the roofline. Gradient from warm brown (#8B7355) to forest green (#6B8F71). White negative space details. Modern, flat design with slight depth. No text.

A clean splash screen for RealEstate AI mobile app. Warm beige background (#FAF7F2) with the RealEstate AI logo centered. Subtle geometric pattern of overlapping house shapes in very light warm brown (#D4C5B2). Minimal and elegant.

differentiators.generative_ai_content: Dynamic property descriptions, marketing copy, and tenant communications generated by AI with tone customization
differentiators.voice_ai_assistants: Hands-free voice interaction for agents to manage properties, query data, and execute commands
differentiators.predictive_investment: AI-powered investment scoring, market trend prediction, and ROI forecasting with confidence intervals
differentiators.hybrid_ai_human: Seamless handoff between AI automation and human decision-making with approval workflows
differentiators.ux_focus: Intuitive design with progressive disclosure, guided onboarding, and contextual help at every step

asset_prompts.prompt: A warm and inviting hero image for the RealEstate AI homepage. The scene should depict a modern, minimalist home interior with natural light and earthy tones. The mood should be calming and welcoming, conveying a sense of trust and reliability. The composition should be clean and uncluttered, with a focus on the architectural details and the use of natural materials. The color palette should be based on the 'Warm Neutrals' color scheme, with accents of green and brown. The viewer should feel a sense of peace and comfort, and be inspired to explore the platform's features.

OG card with the RealEstate AI logo and the tagline 'Smarter Landlording Starts Here' overlaid on a branded background that matches the 'Warm Neutrals' design personality. The background should be a subtle gradient of beige and brown, with a minimalist pattern of geometric shapes. The logo should be placed in the top left corner, and the tagline should be centered below it. The overall design should be clean and professional, conveying a sense of trust and reliability.

A warm, minimalist illustration showing AI analytics in action for property management. Abstract data visualization elements — charts, trend lines, and property icons — rendered in the Warm Neutrals palette (#8B7355, #D4C5B2, #6B8F71). Clean geometric shapes with subtle gradients. No photorealistic elements.

A warm, minimalist illustration of digital rent collection. Abstract representation of payment flow — currency symbols, digital cards, checkmarks — in the Warm Neutrals palette (#8B7355, #D4C5B2, #6B8F71). Clean, modern, geometric style with soft shadows.

A warm, minimalist illustration of predictive maintenance for properties. Abstract wrench/tool icons combined with AI prediction graphs and property silhouettes. Warm Neutrals palette (#8B7355, #D4C5B2, #6B8F71) with green accent for positive predictions. Clean geometric style.

accessibility.screen_reader: All interactive elements have ARIA labels
accessibility.keyboard_navigation: Full tab navigation with visible focus rings
